content:
- Executed plan for etcd watch bootstrap timeout: in src/dcs/etcd_store.rs, connect_with_worker_bootstrap_timeout no longer blocks on worker join when startup recv_timeout hits Timeout; it sends Shutdown, drops command_tx, and detaches the JoinHandle. Also distinguishes RecvTimeoutError::Disconnected with a clearer error.
- Strengthened timeout regression test by injecting a 2.5s establish delay + asserting connect returns <1s, with an outer 2s timeout so join-regressions fail deterministically.
- Added RealEtcdFixture::restart_preserve and a new reconnect test that verifies a non-empty snapshot after restart produces Reset + leader PUT and rebuilds cache authoritatively.
- Added store-level ordering regression test for Put(stale), Reset, Put(fresh).
- Validation: make check OK; make test initially hit Makefile 120s timeout on cold compile, rerun warm passed; make test-long flaked once (transport error submitting /switchover) then passed on rerun; make lint OK.
- Updated task file with checkmarks and passes=true, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed + pushed. Appended AGENTS.md with learning about intermittent test-long /switchover transport flake and pushed follow-up commit.
